testcase.name: isEmptyValue > returns true for null
isEmptyValue > returns true for undefined
isEmptyValue > returns true for
isEmptyValue > returns true for
isEmptyValue > returns false for 0
isEmptyValue > returns false for false
isEmptyValue > returns false for 0
isEmptyValue > returns false for
isEmptyValue > returns false for {}
isEmptyValue > returns false for
getOutputsSchema > returns the schema from resolveOutputSchema
getOutputsSchema > returns empty object when resolveOutputSchema returns null
getMetricFieldsFromEvaluator — scalar types > produces a number field with null default
getMetricFieldsFromEvaluator — scalar types > produces an integer field with null default
getMetricFieldsFromEvaluator — scalar types > produces a boolean field with null default
getMetricFieldsFromEvaluator — scalar types > produces a string field with empty-string default
getMetricFieldsFromEvaluator — array type > produces an array field with item schema
getMetricFieldsFromEvaluator — array type > defaults item type to string when items is missing
getMetricFieldsFromEvaluator — anyOf schema > unwraps the first anyOf entry to get the real type
getMetricFieldsFromEvaluator — array-of-types > filters 'null' from the type array and uses the remaining types
getMetricFieldsFromEvaluator — array-of-types > skips the property when only 'null' type remains after filtering
getMetricFieldsFromEvaluator — array-of-types > includes non-null enum values and strips null/empty entries
getMetricFieldsFromEvaluator — edge cases > returns empty object for an empty schema
getMetricFieldsFromEvaluator — edge cases > skips unsupported types (e.g. 'object')
getMetricFieldsFromEvaluator — edge cases > skips properties with no type field
getMetricsFromAnnotation — flat outputs matching schema > fills a number field from flat outputs
getMetricsFromAnnotation — flat outputs matching schema > fills a string field from flat outputs
getMetricsFromAnnotation — flat outputs matching schema > uses schema default when key is absent in outputs
getMetricsFromAnnotation — flat outputs matching schema > uses '' as default for a missing string field
getMetricsFromAnnotation — nested outputs > flattens metrics nested under 'metrics' key
getMetricsFromAnnotation — nested outputs > flattens fields nested under 'notes' key
getMetricsFromAnnotation — nested outputs > flattens fields nested under 'extra' key
getMetricsFromAnnotation — nested outputs > flat keys outside of metrics/notes/extra are preserved directly
getMetricsFromAnnotation — schema-free inference > infers a number field from a numeric output value
getMetricsFromAnnotation — schema-free inference > infers a boolean field from a boolean output value
getMetricsFromAnnotation — schema-free inference > infers a string field from a string output value
getMetricsFromAnnotation — schema-free inference > serialises an object output to a JSON string field
getMetricsFromAnnotation — schema-free inference > returns empty object when annotation outputs are empty
getQueueAnnotationTag > formats queue ID into tag
getQueueAnnotationTag > handles arbitrary queue IDs
mergeTestcaseAnnotationTags > always includes the queue tag and kind tag
mergeTestcaseAnnotationTags > merges existing tags without duplicates
mergeTestcaseAnnotationTags > adds output keys as tags
mergeTestcaseAnnotationTags > handles null existingTags gracefully
mergeTestcaseAnnotationTags > filters out falsy tags from existingTags
selectQueueScopedAnnotation — no match > returns null annotation when list is empty
selectQueueScopedAnnotation — no match > returns null annotation when no annotation matches the evaluator slug
selectQueueScopedAnnotation — queue-scoped matching > returns the annotation when exactly one queue-scoped match exists
selectQueueScopedAnnotation — queue-scoped matching > returns duplicate_queue_annotations when multiple queue-scoped annotations match
selectQueueScopedAnnotation — queue-scoped matching > ignores annotations scoped to a different queue
selectQueueScopedAnnotation — legacy fallback > falls back to a legacy annotation (no queue tags) when no queue-scoped match
selectQueueScopedAnnotation — legacy fallback > returns duplicate_legacy_annotations when multiple legacy annotations match
selectQueueScopedAnnotation — evaluatorWorkflowId matching > matches annotation by evaluator workflow ID
getTestsetSyncEvaluatorColumnKey > returns evaluator slug when no annotation supplied
getTestsetSyncEvaluatorColumnKey > prefers annotation's evaluator slug over evaluator.slug
getTestsetSyncEvaluatorColumnKey > falls back to evaluator.workflowId when slug is empty
getTestsetSyncEvaluatorColumnKey > returns empty string when evaluator has no slug or workflowId
buildTestsetSyncOperations > maps target rows to replace operations
buildTestsetSyncOperations > produces an empty replace list for a target with no rows
remapTargetRowsToBaseRevision > keeps rows whose rowId exists directly in baseRows
remapTargetRowsToBaseRevision > remaps a row using testcase_dedup_id when rowId is not in baseRows
remapTargetRowsToBaseRevision > also remaps using legacy __dedup_id__ key
remapTargetRowsToBaseRevision > drops rows with no matching rowId and no dedup key
remapTargetRowsToBaseRevision > updates rowCount to reflect mapped rows only
buildTraceTestsetRows > builds a row per scenario with trace inputs and output
buildTraceTestsetRows > expands a nested 'inputs' key into top-level columns
buildTraceTestsetRows > merges annotation outputs into the row
buildTraceTestsetRows > handles a missing scenario gracefully (uses empty defaults)
buildTestcaseExportRows > builds a row when annotation data exists for the testcase
buildTestcaseExportRows > skips a scenario with no testcase mapping
buildTestcaseExportRows > skips a testcase with no annotations
buildTestsetSyncPreview > returns a missing_testcase conflict when testcase not found
buildTestsetSyncPreview > returns a missing_testset conflict when testcase has no testset_id
buildTestsetSyncPreview > returns a missing_latest_revision conflict when no revision for testset
buildTestsetSyncPreview > produces a clean target when everything is resolved
buildTestsetSyncPreview > records duplicate_queue_annotations conflict and skips the row
buildTestsetSyncPreview > groups rows from different scenarios under the same testset target
buildTestsetSyncPreview > skips rows with no annotation data and does not add them as conflicts
